title: Connected Trials
description: Adds connected textures for Copper blocks, Copper grates and Tuff blocks
body:
Requires Optifine or Continuity or ConnectedTextureMod to work.  
---   

### Adds connected textures for the following blocks:
 - Copper blocks
 - Copper grates
 - Chiseled Tuff Bricks 
 - Polished Tuff

See [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/project/connected-trials/gallery) to see what the textures would look like.   
Don't want the tuff blocks? Download [Connected Copper Blocks](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/connected-copper-blocks) instead.
